briefing.headline: Rig up a Drop Shot — steady winter approach for stained water.
briefing.gameplan:
The Drop Shot is a strong choice for winter with stained water and stable conditions.

Johnston: On deep Lake Ontario smallmouth at 33 feet, use a drop shot with a 3/8-ounce weight in all conditions. On calm days, cast it out and let it sit — don't move it. On rough, windy days, cast past the fish and drag it through them.

Key adjustment for stable: moderate cadence — match the natural pace of local forage.

primaryApproach.targets: Focus on riprap, grass, rock. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

alternateApproach.retrieve: Johnston: Use a heavier drop shot weight up-current from structure to keep the bait down in current. In slacker water behind the structure, use a lighter weight for the same presentation, which is imp
alternateApproach.targets: Focus on riprap, grass, rock. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

proInsights.insight: Wheeler: Cherokee smallmouth were feeding up, not down — a dropshot dropped in front of them wouldn't get bit. Had to keep the bait 2 ft above their heads for them to come up off the bottom and eat

Johnston: Use Garmin Perspective Mode when seeing bed fish in low-visibility conditions. This was one of two main tools (along with flipping and drop shot baits) for bed fishing at the St. Johns River.

KVD: On lowland reservoirs with grass (Guntersville, Toledo Bend, Okeechobee), bass don't leave shallow areas even in extreme cold. They stage in slightly deeper areas adjacent to spawning flats — drains, ditches, depressions, holes in the grass. ...

briefing.depthStrategy: Stable winter conditions position bass at 15-35ft on main lake structure — bluffs, steep points, channel bends. Fish are lethargic and grouped tight. Vertical presentations directly on structure are essential.
adjustIf: If conditions suddenly shift (pressure drop, wind change), be ready to speed up your approach — transitional moments produce big bites
If water clears significantly, downsize presentations and move to natural color patterns
If you get followers without commits, add scent or downsize your hook/weight
